hero.title: Agent Teams
hero.subtitle: Wewe ndiye Boss, agents ni timu yako. Zinashughulikia tasks zenyewe, zinatumiana ujumbe na kureview code. Wewe unaangalia kanban board na kunywa kahawa.

features.title: Timu za agents
features.description: Unda timu zenye roles tofauti. Agents hufanya kazi kwa kujitegemea na kwa parallel, huwasiliana na kushirikiana kati ya timu.

features.title: Kanban board
features.description: Status za tasks hubadilika realtime agents zinapofanya kazi. Drag, assign na review vyote kwenye board ya kuona.

features.title: Code review
features.description: Diff view kwa kila task pamoja na accept, reject na comment. Code editor ya ndani yenye Git support.

features.title: Mawasiliano kati ya timu
features.description: Agents hutumiana ujumbe ndani ya timu na kati ya timu. Direct messages, task comments na quick actions.

features.title: Solo mode
features.description: Anza na agent mmoja anayejisimamia tasks. Panua kuwa timu kamili unapohitaji nguvu zaidi.

features.title: Live processes
features.description: Ona agents zinazoendelea, fungua URLs kwenye browser na fuatilia token usage na session context realtime.

faq.question: Agent Teams ni nini?
faq.answer: Desktop app ya kuendesha timu za AI agents kwa local coordination layer yetu. Agents zina roles, hufanya kazi autonomously, hushirikiana kupitia kanban board na zinaweza kutumia Anthropic au Codex.

faq.question: Je, ni bure kweli?
faq.answer: Ndiyo. App ni bure na open source. Unaweza kuanza na free model bila auth - hakuna registration, API key au credit card. Kwa models zaidi, unganisha Claude, Codex, OpenCode/OpenRouter au provider mwingine unaoungwa mkono.

faq.question: Ni platforms zipi zinaungwa mkono?
faq.answer: macOS (Apple Silicon na Intel), Windows na Linux.

faq.question: Inafanyaje kazi?
faq.answer: Install app, unda team, gawa roles. Agents zinaanza kufanya kazi parallel. Unaangalia progress kwenye kanban, kureview diffs na kuzungumza moja kwa moja na agents.

faq.question: Code yangu ni private?
faq.answer: Kila kitu huendeshwa locally kwenye machine yako. Hakuna data hutumwa kwa external servers. Code, conversations na agent activity zinabaki private.

faq.question: Ninahitaji nini kuanza?
faq.answer: Install app tu - anza na free model bila auth, kisha unganisha provider-backed models kwenye UI unapozihitaji.

download.title: Download
download.note: Chagua platform yako na uanze kujenga na timu za AI agents.
